description: A marketer wants to create a special promotion for 'high-value' customers.

nodes.task_description: Open the customer segmentation tool in the marketing platform.

expected_outcome.expected: The marketer accesses the audience builder.

nodes.task_description: Create a new segment with the rules: (Is a loyalty member) AND (Total spend in last 12 months > $1000).

expected_outcome.expected: The marketer defines the criteria for the high-value segment.

nodes.task_description: Save the segment. The system generates a list of all customers who meet the criteria.

expected_outcome.expected: A new target audience is created and can be used for future marketing campaigns.
